name: Quick & Easy Chocolate Frosting
recipeIngredient: 3 Hershey's unsweetened baking chocolate (1 oz each, broken into pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over low heat, melt the chocolate, stirring constantly.
2. Add the marshmallows and stir frequently until melted (the mixture will be very thick and will pull away from the sides of the pan).
3. Spoon the mixture into a small mixing bowl.
4. Beat in the butter.
5. Gradually add milk, beating until smooth.
6. Gradually add powdered sugar and vanilla; beat to the desired consistency. The frosting should reach about 2-1/4 cups.
